title: The Case Against a Near-Term Decision to Reprocess Spent Nuclear Fuel in the United States
summary: Testimony of Matthew Bunn for the Subcommittee on Energy, Committee on Science, United States House of Representatives. Hearing on Nuclear Fuel Reprocessing, June 16, 2005.
